svg.text: Complete end-to-end user journey through the fairness auditing platform

g.text: 🔒 All protected routes wrapped by AppShell + ProtectedRoute (JWT validation)
GCS mode: file → bucket, metadata in MongoDB
Risk badges • Summaries • Scoped to user
User B CANNOT access or modify User A data
Dashboard, logs, reports all filtered by authenticated user
Arrows indicate direction of flow. Dashed lines indicate implicit connections. Branching indicates optional/parallel actions the user can take from a result view.

svg.text: FairScan v1.0 • Architecture + User Flow Documentation
